message:
test(conformance): align btrfs_device_tree_walk test with new walk_device_tree signature

Commit 75b0bf0 ("fix(btrfs): verify tree block checksums during tree walks")
extended walk_device_tree() to take a csum_type: u16 argument so tree-block
checksum validation can be applied during the walk. The conformance test still
called the old 4-arg form, so the workspace would fail to compile.

Pass 0 for csum_type in the test harness. Zero maps to BTRFS_CSUM_TYPE_CRC32 in
the on-disk format and preserves the pre-checksum-validation behavior for this
fixture — the synthetic device tree fed in by the test is not csum-stamped, so
asking for CRC32 matches what the test's read path already produces.

No behavior change in production code; this is purely a test-harness follow-up
to keep `cargo check --all-targets` green after the parallel btrfs change.
